mapper.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE period_params AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '30' THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1))::date WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN ((MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1) - INTERVAL '1 month') + INTERVAL '20 day')::date END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_dt, TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '30' THEN (DATE_TRUNC('month', MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1)) + INTERVAL '1 month')::date WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN (MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1) + INTERVAL '20 day')::date END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_dt ), ultimate_parent_map AS ( SELECT company_id, excclc_company_id AS parent_id, excclc_company_id AS ultimate_id, 1 AS level FROM shipper WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT upm.company_id, s.excclc_company_id, s.excclc_company_id, upm.level + 1 FROM ultimate_parent_map upm INNER JOIN shipper s ON upm.ultimate_id = s.company_id WHERE s.del_yn = 'N' AND s.use_yn = 'Y' AND upm.ultimate_id != s.excclc_company_id AND upm.level < 4 ), final_parent_map AS MATERIALIZED ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (company_id) company_id, ultimate_id FROM ultimate_parent_map upm WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipper boss_sh WHERE boss_sh.company_id = upm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' ) ORDER BY company_id, level DESC ), transport_by_month AS MATERIALIZED ( SELECT tr.transport_id, trd.transport_dtl_id, trd.calculation_cd, trd.amount, fpm.ultimate_id AS boss_id, 1 AS bill_dtl_dgre FROM transport_dtl trd CROSS JOIN period_params pp INNER JOIN transport tr ON tr.transport_id = trd.transport_id AND tr.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = tr.sender_company_id WHERE trd.del_yn = 'N' AND trd.calculation_target_cd = 'SENDER' AND trd.shipment_operation_date >= pp.start_dt AND trd.shipment_operation_date < pp.end_dt
UNION ALL
SELECT tr.transport_id, trd.transport_dtl_id, trd.calculation_cd, trd.amount, fpm.ultimate_id AS boss_id, 1 AS bill_dtl_dgre FROM transport_dtl trd CROSS JOIN period_params pp INNER JOIN transport tr ON tr.transport_id = trd.transport_id AND tr.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = tr.receiver_company_id WHERE trd.del_yn = 'N' AND trd.calculation_target_cd = 'RECEIVER' AND trd.shipment_operation_date >= pp.start_dt AND trd.shipment_operation_date < pp.end_dt )
mapper.select:
/* selectBillDtlByTransportData - 화주업체 거래내역 무관 청구 포함 */
, /* 실적 기반 집계 (보스 ID 기준) */ transport_by_month_settled_group AS ( SELECT tbm.transport_id, tbm.boss_id AS calculation_company_id, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS untpc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.1) AS untpc_vat, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS weight_untpc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.1) AS weight_untpc_vat, tbm.bill_dtl_dgre FROM transport_by_month tbm GROUP BY tbm.transport_id, tbm.boss_id, tbm.bill_dtl_dgre ), companies_with_transport AS ( SELECT DISTINCT calculation_company_id FROM transport_by_month_settled_group ), bill_company_calculation_company_total_mapping AS ( SELECT tbmsg.calculation_company_id, COALESCE(MAX(sh_group.communication_fee), 0) AS communication_fee, ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(sh_group.communication_fee), 0) * 0.1) AS communication_fee_vat, SUM(tbmsg.untpc) AS untpc, SUM(tbmsg.untpc_vat) AS untpc_vat, SUM(tbmsg.weight_untpc) AS weight_untpc, SUM(tbmsg.weight_untpc_vat) AS weight_untpc_vat, COUNT(tbmsg.transport_id) AS tot_count, tbmsg.bill_dtl_dgre FROM transport_by_month_settled_group tbmsg LEFT JOIN shipper sh_group ON sh_group.company_id = tbmsg.calculation_company_id AND sh_group.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND sh_group.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY tbmsg.calculation_company_id, tbmsg.bill_dtl_dgre ), /* 미실적 통신비 전용 업체 (보스 ID 기준) */ shipper_companies_without_transport AS ( SELECT CAST(fpm.ultimate_id AS INTEGER) AS calculation_company_id, MAX(sh.communication_fee) AS communication_fee, ROUND(MAX(sh.communication_fee) * 0.1) AS communication_fee_vat, 0 AS untpc, 0 AS untpc_vat, 0 AS weight_untpc, 0 AS weight_untpc_vat, 0 AS tot_count, 1 AS bill_dtl_dgre FROM shipper sh INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = sh.company_id INNER JOIN shipper boss_sh ON boss_sh.company_id = fpm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN company c ON c.company_id = sh.company_id AND c.shipper_yn = 'Y' AND c.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN companies_with_transport cwt ON cwt.calculation_company_id = fpm.ultimate_id WHERE sh.del_yn = 'N' AND sh.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND cwt.calculation_company_id IS NULL AND sh.communication_fee > 0 GROUP BY fpm.ultimate_id ) /* 최종 통합 출력 */ SELECT calculation_company_id , (SELECT company_nm FROM company WHERE company_id = calculation_company_id) AS company_nm , communication_fee, communication_fee_vat, untpc, untpc_vat, weight_untpc, weight_untpc_vat , (communication_fee + communication_fee_vat + untpc + untpc_vat + weight_untpc + weight_untpc_vat) AS tot_amount , tot_count, bill_dtl_dgre, #{param.billId} AS bill_id FROM ( SELECT * FROM bill_company_calculation_company_total_mapping UNION ALL SELECT * FROM shipper_companies_without_transport ) final_all ORDER BY tot_count DESC, tot_amount DESC

/* selectTaxInvoiceExcelData */ SELECT bd.calculation_company_id, com.company_nm AS calculation_company_nm, REPLACE(com.biz_no, '-','') AS biz_no , com.address, com.representative_nm, com.biz_type, com.biz_item, com.email , bi.bill_company_id, bc.company_nm AS bill_company_nm, REPLACE(bc.biz_no, '-','') AS bill_biz_no , bc.address AS bill_address, bc.representative_nm AS bill_representative_nm, bc.biz_type AS bill_biz_type, bc.biz_item AS bill_biz_item, bc.email AS bill_email , bi.year, bi.month, bi.bill_cd , (bd.tot_amount - (COALESCE(bd.communication_fee_vat,0)) - (COALESCE(bd.untpc_vat,0))- (COALESCE(bd.weight_untpc_vat,0))) AS tot_amount , (COALESCE(bd.communication_fee_vat,0) + COALESCE(bd.untpc_vat,0) + COALESCE(bd.weight_untpc_vat,0)) AS tot_amount_vat , bd.communication_fee, bd.communication_fee_vat , (bd.untpc + bd.weight_untpc) AS use_fee , (bd.untpc_vat + bd.weight_untpc_vat) AS use_fee_vat FROM bill_dtl bd INNER JOIN bill bi ON bi.bill_id = bd.bill_id AND bi.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN bill_company bc ON bc.bill_company_id = bi.bill_company_id AND bc.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN company com ON com.company_id = bd.calculation_company_id AND com.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN shipper shi ON shi.company_id = com.company_id AND shi.taxbil_output_yn = 'Y' AND shi.del_yn = 'N' WHERE bi."year" = #{year} AND bi."month" = #{month} AND bi.bill_cd = #{billCd} AND bi.bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} AND bd.del_yn = 'N' AND bd.bill_dtl_dgre = ( SELECT MAX(bd2.bill_dtl_dgre) FROM bill_dtl bd2 WHERE bd2.bill_id = bd.bill_id AND bd2.calculation_company_id = bd.calculation_company_id AND bd2.del_yn = 'N' ) ORDER BY convert_to(com.company_nm, 'EUC_KR')

/* selectCompanyBillDataList */ SELECT btd.transport_id, bt.sender_company_nm, bt.receiver_company_nm ,CASE WHEN bt.receiver_tel_no ~ '^02\d{7,8}$' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(bt.receiver_tel_no, '(^02)(\d{3,4})(\d{4}$)', '\1-\2-\3') WHEN bt.receiver_tel_no ~ '^01\d{8,9}$' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(bt.receiver_tel_no, '(^01\d{1})(\d{3,4})(\d{4}$)', '\1-\2-\3') WHEN bt.receiver_tel_no ~ '^0\d{9,10}$' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(bt.receiver_tel_no, '(^0\d{2})(\d{3,4})(\d{4}$)', '\1-\2-\3') ELSE bt.receiver_tel_no END AS receiver_tel_no , btd.calculation_cd, btd.calculation_target_cd, btd.kind_cd, co1.code_nm AS kind_nm , CASE WHEN btd.calculation_cd = 'QTY' AND bt.charge_cd = 'CH003' THEN 'CH001' ELSE bt.charge_cd END AS charge_cd , CASE WHEN btd.calculation_cd = 'QTY' AND bt.charge_cd = 'CH003' THEN '선불' ELSE co2.code_nm END AS charge_nm , SUM(btd.qty) AS qty, btd.untpc, SUM(btd.amount) AS amount , SUM((btd.qty * COALESCE(btd.untpc,0))) AS total_amount , to_char(btd.shipment_operation_date::date, 'MM-DD') AS bill_date FROM bill_transport_dtl btd INNER JOIN bill_transport bt ON bt.transport_id = btd.transport_id AND bt.bill_id = btd.bill_id AND bt.bill_dtl_id = btd.bill_dtl_id AND bt.bill_dtl_dgre = btd.bill_dtl_dgre AND bt.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN bill_dtl bd ON bd.bill_id = #{billId} AND bd.bill_dtl_id = btd.bill_dtl_id AND bd.del_yn = 'N' AND bd.bill_dtl_dgre = ( SELECT MAX(bd2.bill_dtl_dgre) FROM bill_dtl bd2 WHERE bd2.bill_id = bd.bill_id AND bd2.calculation_company_id = btd.calculation_company_id AND bd2.del_yn = 'N' ) INNER JOIN bill b ON b.bill_id = bd.bill_id INNER JOIN bill_company bco ON bco.bill_company_id = b.bill_company_id INNER JOIN code co1 ON co1.code_val = btd.kind_cd AND co1.type = 'KIND_TYPE' INNER JOIN code co2 ON co2.code_val = bt.charge_cd AND co2.type = 'CHARGE' WHERE btd.bill_id = #{billId} AND btd.calculation_company_id = #{calculationCompanyId} AND btd.del_yn = 'N' AND b."year" = #{year} AND b."month" = #{month} AND b.bill_cd = #{billCd} AND b.bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} GROUP BY btd.transport_id, bt.sender_company_nm, bt.receiver_company_nm , bt.receiver_tel_no , btd.calculation_cd, btd.calculation_target_cd, btd.kind_cd, co1.code_nm , bt.charge_cd, co2.code_nm , btd.untpc , btd.shipment_operation_date::date ORDER BY btd.shipment_operation_date::date, btd.transport_id

/* selectCompanyBillDataListByKindCd */ SELECT CASE WHEN btd.kind_cd = 'TAC0201' THEN '서류' WHEN btd.kind_cd = 'TAC0203' THEN '롤' WHEN btd.kind_cd = 'TAC0204' THEN '샘플' ELSE '기타' END AS kind_group , SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(btd.calculation_cd) = 'WEIGHT' AND btd.calculation_target_cd = 'SENDER' THEN btd.qty ELSE 0 END) AS communication_prepaid , SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(btd.calculation_cd) = 'WEIGHT' AND btd.calculation_target_cd = 'RECEIVER' THEN btd.qty ELSE 0 END) AS communication_collect , SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(btd.calculation_cd) = 'QTY' AND UPPER(bt.charge_cd) = 'CH001' THEN btd.qty ELSE 0 END) AS delivery_prepaid , SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(btd.calculation_cd) = 'QTY' AND UPPER(bt.charge_cd) = 'CH002' THEN btd.qty ELSE 0 END) AS delivery_collect , SUM(btd.qty) AS total_qty , SUM(btd.amount) AS total_amount FROM bill_transport_dtl btd INNER JOIN bill_transport bt ON bt.transport_id = btd.transport_id AND bt.bill_id = btd.bill_id AND bt.bill_dtl_id = btd.bill_dtl_id AND bt.bill_dtl_dgre = btd.bill_dtl_dgre AND bt.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN bill_dtl bd ON bd.bill_id = #{billId} AND bd.bill_dtl_id = btd.bill_dtl_id AND bd.del_yn = 'N' AND bd.bill_dtl_dgre = ( SELECT MAX(bd2.bill_dtl_dgre) FROM bill_dtl bd2 WHERE bd2.bill_id = bd.bill_id AND bd2.calculation_company_id = btd.calculation_company_id AND bd2.del_yn = 'N' ) INNER JOIN bill b ON b.bill_id = bd.bill_id WHERE btd.bill_id = #{billId} AND btd.calculation_company_id = #{calculationCompanyId} AND btd.del_yn = 'N' AND b."year" = #{year} AND b."month" = #{month} AND b.bill_cd = #{billCd} AND b.bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} GROUP BY kind_group

/* selectCompanyDetailInvoicePage */ SELECT b."year", b."month", b.bill_cd, b.bill_company_id , bd.calculation_company_id FROM bill b INNER JOIN bill_dtl bd ON bd.bill_id = b.bill_id AND bd.del_yn = 'N' WHERE b.del_yn = 'N' AND b.bill_id = #{billId} AND bd.bill_dtl_id = #{billDtlId}
mapper.insert:
/* insertBillDtl */ INSERT INTO bill_dtl ( bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, tot_amount, tot_count, communication_fee, communication_fee_vat, untpc, untpc_vat, weight_untpc, weight_untpc_vat, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{item.billId}, #{item.billDtlDgre}, #{item.calculationCompanyId}, #{item.totAmount}, #{item.totCount}, #{item.communicationFee}, #{item.communicationFeeVat}, #{item.untpc}, #{item.untpcVat}, #{item.weightUntpc}, #{item.weightUntpcVat}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' )

/* insertBillDtlReCalculation - 화주업체 거래내역 무관 재계산 */
, /* 필터링 CTE 추가 */ filtered_transport AS ( SELECT * FROM transport_by_month WHERE boss_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId} ), latest_dgre AS ( SELECT calculation_company_id, MAX(bill_dtl_dgre) AS max_dgre FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND calculation_company_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId} AND del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY calculation_company_id ), transport_agg AS ( SELECT tbm.boss_id AS calculation_company_id, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS untpc, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS weight_untpc, COUNT(DISTINCT tbm.transport_id) AS tot_count FROM filtered_transport tbm GROUP BY tbm.boss_id ), /* 해당 업체의 통신비 설정 정보 조회 */ current_comm_setting AS ( SELECT fpm.ultimate_id AS calculation_company_id, MAX(s.communication_fee) AS communication_fee FROM shipper s INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = s.company_id INNER JOIN shipper boss_sh ON boss_sh.company_id = fpm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' AND boss_sh.shipper_cd = 'COM' WHERE fpm.ultimate_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId} AND s.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND s.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND s.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND s.del_yn = 'N' AND s.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY fpm.ultimate_id ) INSERT INTO bill_dtl ( bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, tot_amount, tot_count, communication_fee, communication_fee_vat, untpc, untpc_vat, weight_untpc, weight_untpc_vat, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT #{param.billId}, COALESCE(ld.max_dgre, 0) + 1, base.calculation_company_id, /* 총액 계산: (공급가액 합산 * 1.1) */ ROUND((COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0) + COALESCE(tag.untpc, 0) + COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc, 0)) * 1.1), COALESCE(tag.tot_count, 0), COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0), ROUND(COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0) * 0.1), COALESCE(tag.untpc, 0), ROUND(COALESCE(tag.untpc, 0) * 0.1), COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc, 0), ROUND(COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc, 0) * 0.1), #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' FROM (SELECT CAST(#{param.calculationCompanyId} AS INTEGER) AS calculation_company_id) base LEFT JOIN latest_dgre ld ON ld.calculation_company_id = base.calculation_company_id LEFT JOIN transport_agg tag ON tag.calculation_company_id = base.calculation_company_id LEFT JOIN current_comm_setting ccs ON ccs.calculation_company_id = base.calculation_company_id WHERE base.calculation_company_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId}

/* insertBillDtlReCalculationAll - 화주업체 거래내역 무관 재계산 */
, latest_dgre AS ( SELECT calculation_company_id, MAX(bill_dtl_dgre) AS max_dgre FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY calculation_company_id ), transport_agg AS ( SELECT tbm.boss_id AS calculation_company_id, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS untpc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.1) AS untpc_vat, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS weight_untpc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.1) AS weight_untpc_vat, COUNT(DISTINCT tbm.transport_id) AS tot_count FROM transport_by_month tbm GROUP BY tbm.boss_id ), current_comm_setting AS ( SELECT fpm.ultimate_id AS calculation_company_id, MAX(s.communication_fee) AS communication_fee FROM shipper s INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = s.company_id INNER JOIN shipper boss_sh ON boss_sh.company_id = fpm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' AND boss_sh.shipper_cd = 'COM' WHERE s.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND s.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND s.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND s.del_yn = 'N' AND s.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY fpm.ultimate_id ), all_targets AS ( SELECT calculation_company_id FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' UNION SELECT calculation_company_id FROM transport_agg UNION SELECT calculation_company_id FROM current_comm_setting ) INSERT INTO bill_dtl ( bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, tot_amount, tot_count, communication_fee, communication_fee_vat, untpc, untpc_vat, weight_untpc, weight_untpc_vat, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT #{param.billId}, COALESCE(ld.max_dgre, 0) + 1, act.calculation_company_id, (COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0) + ROUND(COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0) * 0.1) + COALESCE(tag.untpc, 0) + COALESCE(tag.untpc_vat, 0) + COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc, 0) + COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc_vat, 0)) AS tot_amount, COALESCE(tag.tot_count, 0), COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0), ROUND(COALESCE(ccs.communication_fee, 0) * 0.1), COALESCE(tag.untpc, 0), COALESCE(tag.untpc_vat, 0), COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc, 0), COALESCE(tag.weight_untpc_vat, 0), #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' FROM all_targets act LEFT JOIN latest_dgre ld ON ld.calculation_company_id = act.calculation_company_id LEFT JOIN current_comm_setting ccs ON ccs.calculation_company_id = act.calculation_company_id LEFT JOIN transport_agg tag ON tag.calculation_company_id = act.calculation_company_id
mapper.update:
/* updateShipmentSettleStatus */
UPDATE shipment SET settle_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND settle_yn = 'N' AND reg_dt >= CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN (CAST(#{param.year} || '-' || #{param.month} || '-01' AS date) - INTERVAL '1 month') + INTERVAL '20 days' ELSE CAST(#{param.year} || '-' || #{param.month} || '-01' AS date) END AND reg_dt < CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN CAST(#{param.year} || '-' || #{param.month} || '-20' AS date) + INTERVAL '1 day' ELSE CAST(#{param.year} || '-' || #{param.month} || '-01' AS date) + INTERVAL '1 month' END

UPDATE bill_history_dtl SET bill_status_cd = #{billStatusCd}, tot_amount = #{totAmount}, bass_amount = #{bassAmount}, bass_amount_vat = #{bassAmountVat}, delivery_amount = #{deliveryAmount}, delivery_amount_vat = #{deliveryAmountVat}, edi_amount = #{ediAmount}, edi_amount_vat = #{ediAmountVat}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = #{chgDt} WHERE bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
